title: The Avian Race (Thoth & Garuda)
summary: The hyperdimensional bird-beings the archive credits as the pyramid builders — Thoth in Egypt, Garuda in Cambodia.
markdown:
The **Avian race** are hyperdimensional bird-like beings the archive places among Earth's
oldest teachers — older, in the December 21, 2020 session's telling, than the Reptilians, the
Greys, and humanity itself. Now existing in light-body form, they are credited with building
the **pyramids and the ancient AI grid networks**.

The sessions map them onto ancient tradition directly: in Egypt they were remembered as **Thoth**; in
Cambodia as **Garuda** (គ្រុឌ) — a link that lands close to home for the archive, given
[Kosol Ouch's](/lore/kosol-ouch/) Khmer lineage and the [Angkor Wat](/lore/alvin-seyha/)
material. Their grid-building work connects to the ley-line and pyramid networks whose later
destruction the [Atlantis](/lore/atlantis/) session describes.

The Avians also appear in stranger registers — the "Avian Four" Federation ship that triggers
the portal-sealing battle in the [Unit X14](/lore/unit-x14/) session — making them one of the
archive's most resonant and most enigmatic lineages.
